  • PRIVACY POLICY

PRIVACY POLICY

Effective for all EE Games titles  ·  Updated 2025

Thank you for playing games developed by EE Games, including our current title "Brianna's Game".

We respect your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we handle information in all games we publish.

INFORMATION WE COLLECT

EE Games does not collect, store, or share any personally identifiable information (PII) from users.

We do not:

  • Require account creation
  • Store player data on servers
  • Collect analytics
  • Track personal information

All gameplay data remains on the user's device.

THIRD-PARTY SERVICES

Some of our games, including Brianna's Game, use Google AdMob to display advertisements.

AdMob may automatically collect certain non-personally identifiable information such as:

  • Device identifiers (e.g., advertising ID)
  • Rough location (for regional ad relevance)
  • Interaction with ads

This data is handled by Google, not by EE Games. You can learn more about how Google uses information at policies.google.com/technologies/ads.

Depending on your region, you may be shown a consent prompt regarding personalized ads.

CHILDREN'S PRIVACY

Our games are not intended to knowingly collect personal data from children.

If you believe that information has been collected inadvertently by a third-party service, please contact us and we will assist in resolving the issue.

DATA STORAGE

EE Games does not store personal data on our servers. We do not transmit personal information from your device.

SECURITY

Since we do not collect personal information, there is no risk of personal data exposure from our systems.

SHARING OF INFORMATION

We do not share any personal information with third parties other than what is automatically handled by third-party advertising services such as AdMob.

LINKS TO THIRD-PARTY SITES

Ads may lead to external websites. Those sites are outside our control and have their own privacy practices.

CHANGES TO THIS POLICY

This Privacy Policy may be updated as our games evolve or new titles are released. Updates will be posted on this page.

CONTACT US

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, you may contact:

EE Games
Email: support@ee-games.com

EE GAMES

Made with ❤ and too much caffeine  ·  All games original  ·  © 2025
